text:
Here is the correct fix. It fix all the cases where it can happen (i.e. etherswitchctl vlangroupX vlan, etherswitchctl vlangroupX members, etherswitchcfg port1 vlangroup, etherswitchcfg port1 media, etc.).


On Apr 17, 2013, at 5:48 PM, Luiz Otavio O Souza wrote:

> Please, don't commit the fix in this PR, it's wrong. I'll submit the correct fix later.
